title: Kuma’s Life as a Buccaneer
description: On pages 15–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Bonney, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Kuma as Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.
scene: Bonney discovers Kuma’s memories, revealing his Buccaneer heritage, Ginny, the Revolutionary Army, God Valley, and the painful origins behind Kuma’s sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: TAKE CARE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The pirates of the world were utterly shocked...

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: ...when the infamous tyrant, Kuma...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Suddenly became an absolutely obedient member of the seven warlords.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Young Master!! There's a new warlord!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kuma the tyrant? Sounds like another villain has come into play.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: FufU- FufU!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What do you think?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I couldn't care less.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have you taken care of those idiots who spotted our rainmaking ship yet?*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He looks as big as white- beard!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Koby! Who do you reckon is stronger, me or him?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Y-You, of course, alvida-sama!! Ehe he he he he he...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So they finally found a replacement?! That's great news, jinbe!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Considering the circumstances, you're the last person I'd expect to say that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm still reading the details about him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He's a former King....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is on top of the reigning King we already have in our ranks. The pirate world really is changing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Their business doesn't affect us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I follow no man's orders!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Princess, it's essential that 'You keep track of information like this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ki Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi Shi

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They say he's a paw-planned man!! That doesn't exactly sound frightening, does it...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Well, he's already a warlord, so he's gotta be strong enough to make the cut, Moria-sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't the warWords answer directly to the government?!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Kuma-San would never work for them....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dear Bonney... I'm still at sea as I write this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've become quite well known and it's getting harder and harder to sail in peace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: ...But, I'm doing okay.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm doing my best to find interesting travel destinations for when you turn 10.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: kOO!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll be a long journey to deliver this, please take care.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope everyone back home is doing as well as I am.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi sh

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kuma, come in. You have new commands from the government!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What is your current location?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm in the East Blue... What are my orders?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Front cover and color spread next issue!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney’s Tragedy through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
